user.title: Satel Integra — Connection
user.description:
Configure the connection to your Satel Integra alarm panel via its ETHM ethernet module.

Integra with ETHM-1 Plus Module (Newer). Push/event mode. Optional AES encryption via integration key.
Integra with ETHM-1 Module (Original). Polling mode (100 ms). AES encryption not supported.

Zones, partitions and outputs are automatically discovered from the panel — no YAML configuration needed.
This can take minutes, be patient !

The alarm code is only required to control programmable outputs (switches).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the ETHM module. Check the IP address and port.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check HA logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This alarm panel is already configured.
